text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Thank you for today... Let's continue this
good work tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Halt! Remain where you stand, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O! Is... is something the matter?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was reading this epic relating a tale of two
warriors and their collegial rivalry, and I could not
help but be reminded of you and me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, a fire blazes within me! What say you to a
friendly duel? Glittering beads of sweat shall fly!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do you mean... running t-together? You and me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Of... of course, I w-would love to! I-if it's okay
with you, th-then absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Would it be all right if I train with Opera
O?
choice_data_list: First, you need to rest and recover!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! I wouldn't want to waste such a
rare invitation!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, I'm n-n-not very c-competent, but I'll
try my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto gives it her all during the session of
extra training!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's true... I wouldn't want to cause you any
trouble, being as tired as I am. I'm really sorry
about this, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but there is beauty in the tragedy that our
paths will not cross! I applaud your trainer's
masterful orchestration!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After apologizing several times over, Meisho
Doto heads back to her dorm.
